payload.title: Perplexity Launches Computer for Counsel: A Multi-Model Agentic Layer for Legal Workflows

payload.title: Docusign & Perplexity Help Legal Teams Automate Enterprise-wide Contract Workflows

payload.title: Gunderson Dettmer to Deepen Perplexity AI Use Following Computer for Counsel Launch
